messages.content: Rust is a systems programming language focused on performance and memory safety.
A tokenizer converts text into token identifiers that a model can process.
What does a language model predict?
A causal language model predicts the next token from earlier tokens.
A checkpoint records training state so an interrupted run can continue.
Pretraining teaches a model language patterns from a text corpus.
Supervised fine-tuning trains a model on example conversations and answers.
Causal masking prevents a token from reading future tokens.
A recorded seed, configuration, data, artifacts, and metrics support reproducibility.
